overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, overpasses, and dense urban architecture. The footage from Cyberpunk 2077 shows the player character navigating through commercial plazas, covered tunnels, and busy intersections with various pedestrians and vehicles.

moves from covered arcade into more open plaza area with ambient light

agents.ego_description: walking through a commercial district with neon signs, passing by storefronts and descending stairs

commercial building with prominent red ATOM signage
multi-story structure with red accents and Japanese architectural elements
yellow and black benches arranged in the open plaza area
large concrete wall with horizontal paneling and ventilation grates

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of towering glass buildings before descending into a neon-lit commercial arcade. The camera passes the ATOM sign and a red-accented traditional building, transitioning into an open plaza with benches and a large concrete retaining wall. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions through the wet paved area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with seating and large digital displays

events.description: passes by seated NPCs on yellow benches in the plaza

agents.ego_description: navigating along the edge of a plaza, passing seated individuals and approaching a road

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on a yellow bench, one looking at a device

entered.detail: metal escalator structure leading to upper levels against the wall
large illuminated billboard displaying advertisements above the plaza
building facade with prominent purple neon lighting and signage

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete plaza lined with benches where NPCs sit idly. The camera moves past a large retaining wall with an escalator structure visible in the distance. Large digital billboards illuminate the area as the scene transitions toward a road with a purple-lit building visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under overpass with commercial storefronts

events.description: turns right from sidewalk onto street passing under large overpass structure
approaches tunnel entrance with distinct blue ceiling lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along a street under overpasses, turning corners and approaching a covered tunnel

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support columns spanning the street
large billboard with VOTE text and political messaging
covered pedestrian and vehicle tunnel with blue neon ceiling lights

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along an asphalt street beneath massive overpass structures, turning right at a corner. The environment features concrete barriers, a VOTE billboard, and approaches a tunnel entrance illuminated by distinctive blue ceiling lights. The area is sparsely populated with few pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit tunnel with blue overhead lighting

events.description: car drives through the tunnel toward the camera
exits the blue-lit tunnel into open street with bright neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered tunnel, sharing space with vehicles and pedestrians, then emerging onto a busy sidewalk

notable_agents.action: sedan driving through the tunnel with headlights on

entered.detail: overhead structure with linear blue fluorescent lighting strips
tall commercial building with prominent MARSHALL signage in yellow neon
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered tunnel illuminated by striking blue overhead lights, sharing the space with an oncoming vehicle and crossing pedestrians. The camera emerges from the enclosed space into a bustling urban area with the Marshall building visible and traffic infrastructure present.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with crosswalks and commercial signage

events.description: approaches crosswalk and stops at red traffic light
stops at corner to wait for traffic signal while pedestrians cross

agents.ego_description: approaching a busy intersection, stopping at the crosswalk to wait for the traffic signal to change

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark coat crossing the street in front of the camera

entered.detail: prominent yellow striped pedestrian crossing marking the intersection
high-rise building covered in bright red and blue neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching a busy neon-lit intersection with the Marshall building prominent on the left. The camera stops at a yellow-striped crosswalk, waiting at a red traffic light while pedestrians cross the street. The area features dense commercial signage and a moderate crowd of NPCs moving through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the heights of glass skyscrapers down into a neon-lit commercial district and through a subterranean passage toward a bustling urban intersection. It begins by descending from towering buildings into a commercial arcade, passing an ATOM sign and a red-accented building before opening into a wet paved plaza with idle pedestrians and large digital billboards. As the camera moves past a concrete retaining wall and an escalator structure, the scene shifts toward an asphalt street beneath massive overpasses, turning a corner past a VOTE billboard. The path then leads directly into a covered tunnel illuminated by striking blue overhead lights, sharing the enclosed space with an oncoming vehicle before emerging back into the open air. Finally, the camera approaches a dense, neon-lit intersection dominated by the Marshall building, coming to a halt at a yellow-striped crosswalk as pedestrians move through the vibrant city traffic.
